scripts.dev:reset: npm run infra:down-v && npm run infra:up && npm run migrate && npm run seed && npm run dev
scripts.dev:backend: concurrently -k -n user,trip,booking,seat,ticket,outbox,analytics,gateway "npm run dev:user" "npm run dev:trip" "npm run dev:booking" "npm run dev:seat" "npm run dev:ticket" "npm run dev:outbox" "npm run dev:analytics" "npm run dev:gateway"
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n user,trip,booking,seat,ticket,outbox,analytics,gateway,frontend "npm run dev:user" "npm run dev:trip" "npm run dev:booking" "npm run dev:seat" "npm run dev:ticket" "npm run dev:outbox" "npm run dev:analytics" "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:frontend"
